name: Family Favorite Chicken and Stuffing Bake
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Instant chicken flavored stuffing mix
10 1/4 oz Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
6 skinless, boneless chicken breast halves (about 1 1/2 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare stuffing mix according to package directions, but add vegetables with the seasoning packet.
3. Combine soup, milk, and parsley in a bowl; set aside.
4. In a 2- or 3-quart shallow baking dish, arrange stuffing across the center of the dish.
5. Spoon a thin layer of the soup mixture on each side of the stuffing.
6. Arrange chicken over the soup mixture; overlap if necessary.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Pour remaining soup mixture over chicken.
9. Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until chicken is fork-tender. Stir sauce before serving.
11. Makes 6 servings.
